---
format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE,message=FALSE}
all_files <- list.files(".")[-1]

for (file in all_files) {
  cat(paste0("![](./", basename(file), ")\n"))
}

```
![](./IMG_4400.jpeg)


![](./IMG_4576.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4581.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4640.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4669.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4677.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4713.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4715.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4726.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4748.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4763.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4783.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4787.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4789.jpeg) ![](./IMG_4798.jpeg)
